creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text:
If I have these files in my directory:

file.(mine).1.txt    file.(mine).2.txt

and my shell is sh, I won't be able to use the tab button to autocomplete either one of those files (if they are both present). The tab button allows me to get to this point:

du -cah file.\(mine\).

...but it won't allow me to autocomplete further. I run 14-CURRENT (yesterday's revision), but even though FreeBSD developers claim that sh became a "usable interactive shell", I have this kind of problem.
